message:
feat: implement pad/gather/scatter VJPs, expand LAX tensor ops, and add trace compilation

Substantial expansion of the automatic differentiation, tensor operation,
and tracing subsystems:

Automatic Differentiation (fj-ad):
- Implement VJP (Vector-Jacobian Product) for Pad primitive with proper
  gradient slicing that accounts for interior padding and pad-value
  gradient accumulation
- Implement VJP for Gather (index into gradient via scatter-add of
  upstream gradients to source positions)
- Implement VJP for Scatter (extract gathered gradient positions and
  accumulate updates gradient)
- Implement VJP for DynamicSlice, DynamicUpdateSlice, Concatenate,
  Reverse, and Transpose primitives
- Add forward-mode JVP stubs for all new primitives

Core (fj-core):
- Add Shape utility methods for rank manipulation, broadcasting
  inference, and stride computation used by new AD rules

E-graph optimization (fj-egraph):
- Fix pattern matching for associative/commutative rewrites that
  could produce incorrect results with non-commutative operations
- Adjust cost model weights for new primitive operations

LAX tensor operations (fj-lax):
- lib.rs: Expand the LAX operation surface with slice_in_dim,
  dynamic_slice, dynamic_update_slice, pad, gather, scatter,
  concatenate, reshape, broadcast_in_dim, squeeze, transpose,
  reverse, sort, top_k, iota, and full-like constructors
- reduction.rs: Add reduction operations (reduce_sum, reduce_max,
  reduce_min, reduce_prod, reduce_mean) along arbitrary axes with
  keepdims support
- tensor_ops.rs: Add element-wise binary operations (add, sub, mul,
  div, pow, max, min, equal, not_equal, greater, less, and, or, xor),
  unary operations (neg, abs, exp, log, sqrt, rsqrt, sign, floor,
  ceil, round, sin, cos, tanh, erf), and type conversion (convert)

Tracing (fj-trace):
- Add trace-based compilation that records operation sequences into
  a replayable IR (Jaxpr-like intermediate representation)
- Implement abstract evaluation for shape/dtype propagation through
  traced computations
- Add trace context management for nested tracing scopes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -120,6 +120,7 @@ pub enum Primitive {
     Reshape,
     Slice,
     DynamicSlice,
+    DynamicUpdateSlice,
     Gather,
     Scatter,
     Transpose,
@@ -130,6 +131,16 @@ pub enum Primitive {
     Clamp,
     // Index generation
     Iota,
+    // Encoding
+    OneHot,
+    // Cumulative
+    Cumsum,
+    Cumprod,
+    // Sorting
+    Sort,
+    Argsort,
+    // Convolution
+    Conv,
 }
 
 impl Primitive {
@@ -186,6 +197,7 @@ impl Primitive {
             Self::Reshape => "reshape",
             Self::Slice => "slice",
             Self::DynamicSlice => "dynamic_slice",
+            Self::DynamicUpdateSlice => "dynamic_update_slice",
             Self::Gather => "gather",
             Self::Scatter => "scatter",
             Self::Transpose => "transpose",
@@ -194,6 +206,12 @@ impl Primitive {
             Self::Pad => "pad",
             Self::Clamp => "clamp",
             Self::Iota => "iota",
+            Self::OneHot => "one_hot",
+            Self::Cumsum => "cumsum",
+            Self::Cumprod => "cumprod",
+            Self::Sort => "sort",
+            Self::Argsort => "argsort",
+            Self::Conv => "conv",
         }
     }
 }

@@ -294,7 +294,14 @@ pub fn jaxpr_to_egraph(jaxpr: &Jaxpr) -> (RecExpr<FjLang>, BTreeMap<VarId, Id>)
             | Primitive::BroadcastInDim
             | Primitive::Concatenate
             | Primitive::Pad
-            | Primitive::Iota => {
+            | Primitive::Iota
+            | Primitive::OneHot
+            | Primitive::DynamicUpdateSlice
+            | Primitive::Cumsum
+            | Primitive::Cumprod
+            | Primitive::Sort
+            | Primitive::Argsort
+            | Primitive::Conv => {
                 panic!(
                     "primitive {} not supported by egraph lowering",
                     eqn.primitive.as_str()
